# Generated by iptables-save v1.8.7 on Sun Feb  8 18:39:17 2026
*filter
:INPUT ACCEPT [0:0]
:FORWARD DROP [0:0]
:OUTPUT ACCEPT [2670:687375]
:BLOCK_TRAFFIC - [0:0]
-A INPUT -i lo -j ACCEPT
-A INPUT -p tcp -m tcp --dport 5000 -j ACCEPT
-A INPUT -p tcp -m tcp --dport 7000 -j ACCEPT
-A INPUT -m state --state RELATED,ESTABLISHED -j ACCEPT
-A FORWARD -m state --state RELATED,ESTABLISHED -j ACCEPT
-A FORWARD -s 192.168.100.0/24 -d 172.20.0.0/24 -j BLOCK_TRAFFIC
-A FORWARD -s 172.20.0.0/24 -d 192.168.100.0/24 -j BLOCK_TRAFFIC
-A BLOCK_TRAFFIC -j DROP
COMMIT
# Completed on Sun Feb  8 18:39:17 2026
# Generated by iptables-save v1.8.7 on Sun Feb  8 18:39:17 2026
*nat
:PREROUTING ACCEPT [0:0]
:INPUT ACCEPT [0:0]
:OUTPUT ACCEPT [141:8460]
:POSTROUTING ACCEPT [1661:87052]
-A POSTROUTING -s 172.20.0.0/24 -o eth0 -j MASQUERADE
COMMIT
# Completed on Sun Feb  8 18:39:17 2026
